name: Fix My Credit
description_short: Credit Union ONE is a Michigan-based credit union offering member banking services including checking, savings, loans, and credit-building products designed to help members repair and improve their financial health.
description_long:
Credit Union ONE is a Michigan credit union (routing #272479841) that serves its membership through a full-service banking platform. The organization positions itself as a financial institution focused on member financial wellness, with particular emphasis on credit repair and improvement as part of broader financial health goals. Their website indicates they operate physical locations, ATMs, and digital banking channels to serve their member base.

The institution offers a comprehensive range of banking products including personal and business checking accounts, savings accounts, certificates of deposit, IRAs, and money market accounts. On the lending side, they provide auto loans, home loans, home equity lines of credit, personal loans, secured loans, and notably a Credit Builder Loan product specifically designed for members needing to repair or build credit. They also offer credit cards, debt consolidation tools, and commercial lending services including SBA lending.

What distinguishes Credit Union ONE is their explicit focus on credit repair as an integrated part of their member services philosophy. Rather than operating as a standalone credit repair company, they embed credit-building products (like their Credit Builder Loan) and financial education resources within a traditional credit union structure. They provide educational content on credit scores, debt consolidation calculators, and seminars on debt strategies and personal banking.

However, it's important to note that Credit Union ONE is fundamentally a banking institution, not a credit repair service. They do not dispute items on credit reports, challenge inaccuracies, or provide the core services associated with dedicated credit repair companies. Their credit repair offerings are limited to providing the financial products and educational resources that can help members improve credit over time through responsible financial behavior.
pros: Offers dedicated Credit Builder Loan product specifically designed for credit repair and building
Provides free financial education including articles on credit scores and debt strategies
Full-service banking eliminates need for multiple financial institutions
Debt consolidation calculator available for members to assess refinancing options
Member-owned credit union structure may offer lower fees than traditional banks
24/7 banking access including digital and telephone banking options
Comprehensive loan products including home, auto, personal, and business lending
cons: Does not offer credit repair services like dispute filing or error correction on credit reports
Membership likely restricted to Michigan residents or specific eligibility criteria
Website content about credit repair is educational only, not service-based
No evidence of dedicated credit counseling or financial advisory for credit repair clients
Limited to serving as a banking partner rather than active credit repair advocate
best_for: Michigan residents seeking to build credit through responsible borrowing with a credit builder loan
Members needing to consolidate debt while maintaining banking relationships
Individuals looking for a full-service financial institution with credit-building products
Small business owners needing commercial banking and SBA lending
diagnosis: Credit Union ONE is best for Michigan credit union members who need to build or repair credit through responsible financial products and education, rather than active credit repair services. The critical caveat is that they are a banking institution, not a credit repair company—they cannot dispute inaccurate items on credit reports or challenge negative marks, only provide financial tools to improve credit over time.
services: Credit Builder Loan for credit repair and building
Home loans and home equity lines of credit
Financial planning and debt strategy consultations
Educational seminars and webinars on financial health
